data.description:
## Summary
Sub-effort (d) of story fatty-cipher-range. test_schema_outputs.py validates some MCP tool outputs against the canonical src/rebar/schemas/*.json; extend until EVERY tool with an outputSchema is covered.

## What
- Enumerate tools mechanically via build_server() + list_tools() (do not hand-maintain the list); for each tool that advertises an outputSchema, drive a real call on a fixture store and jsonschema-validate the result against the canonical schema named in docs/output-schemas.md.
- The gap is coverage, not mechanism — reuse the existing test's harness/fixtures.
- Where a tool lacks a pydantic Out model but has a canonical schema (compare mcp_server.py models against the docs/output-schemas.md table), add the model or document why it is exempt.

## Suggested RED test
The extended parametrized test itself: parametrize over list_tools() output; RED for every uncovered tool until each gets a fixture-driven validation.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Parametrization sourced from list_tools(), not a hand list
- [ ] Every outputSchema-advertising tool validated against its canonical schema
- [ ] Model-vs-schema exemptions (if any) documented in the test
data.title: Contract freeze (d): pin every MCP outputSchema to its canonical JSON Schema
